summary: Resolved two conflicts: accepted deletion of .claude-output.json (a stale metadata artifact removed by origin/main), and merged .review-feedback.txt by combining both branches' review feedback (HEAD had detailed temperature utils review, origin/main had filterCountries review) into a unified document preserving both sets of requirements.
strategyUsed: For .claude-output.json: accepted 'theirs' (deletion) since origin/main correctly removed the stale metadata artifact. For .review-feedback.txt: preserved both versions by merging the detailed HEAD review with the filterCountries concern from origin/main, keeping all blocking issue context.
